creator: chinsan.tw@gmail.com
text:
On 7/31/07, Razor <bg1tpt@gmail.com> wrote:
> The patch is approved. But it seems LATEST_LINK's value is the default
> value. Can it be removed?
>
Hi, Razor:

LATEST_LINK is a necessary hack to make pear-* port respect OPTIONS. :)
Without LATEST_LINK, it wil not work.

> >     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/115050

- chinsan
